title: ranunculus villarsii subsp. sartorianus
intro: Ranunculus villarsii subsp. sartorianus, also known as Yellow Clematis, is a plant species within the Ranunculaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and potential medicinal uses. The plant contains alkaloids and glycosides, which have been reported to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Traditional uses of Ranunculus villarsii subsp. sartorianus include treating various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, which can be used to support health and well-being.
